text:
Shopkeeper Net Navi: "Lubricant oil? Roving drones? Bombs? You want it? It's yours, my friend, as long as you have enough zenny."

Lan selects the bombs, but he doesn't have enough zenny to buy it so the game makes a buzzing noise

Shopkeeper Net Navi: "Sorry, Lan, I can't give credit. Come back when you're a little... MMMMMMMMM... richer!"

text: Remember! As long as you have enough rubies, you can use the ruby-lead against Dr. Morshu! If you don't have enough rubies, use the credit shooter!  Also, he attacks with Crash BOMBer, Atomic Lamp Oil and the Metal rope, so he'll be resistant to that.

text: Well, his area attack bombs can be dodged if you use the time freezing ability. Bring him to half his life, and he'll use lamp oil to make you lose your footing, and then crush you with rope. You have to use the flame ability to burn the lamp oil. It'll catch the rope on fire and lead to him, causing massive damage. Afterwards, he retreats into his fortress further.
